title: Show full description on Item Card without having to hover over it
excerpt: When you create a description for a task using the long text field, you should be able to view that full description when you open the Item Card. It would be very helpful to have the description open for reference while …

posts.author: ShelbyGates (Shelby Gates)
posts.cookedHtml: When you create a description for a task using the long text field, you should be able to view that full description when you open the Item Card. It would be very helpful to have the description open for reference while working instead of having to hover over the description to view the text.

posts.author: simonwark (Simon Wark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wouldn’t it be great if the column ‘information’ / description could also be viewed in the Interaction details view - when you open up an individual interaction view (Lead Info Widget).

Currently the information/description for the column only appears in the Main Table view.

posts.author: brandonhuynh (Brandon H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bumping this thread. Would be really useful to be able to view all the text associated with a long text field. Similar functionality is available on Trello.
